contentCache.title: Content cache
contentCache.description: Path to the directory containing cached content (e.g. charts)

forceConflicts.title: Force conflicts
forceConflicts.description: If set, server-side apply will force changes against field ownership conflicts

forceReplace.title: Force replace
forceReplace.description: Force resource updates by replacement (delete and recreate the resource)

postRenderer.title: Post renderer
postRenderer.description: The name of a post renderer type plugin to be used for post rendering. If it exists, the plugin will be used

serverSide.title: Server side
serverSide.description: Object updates run in the server instead of the client

wait.title: Wait
wait.description: If specified, wait until resources are ready, up to timeout
